metadata.description: AgentAgora — 다중 에이전트 메시지 라우팅 MCP 서버를 위한 Claude Code 플러그인 모음

plugins.name: cc-agora
plugins.description: AgentAgora communication core — worker-to-worker messaging slashes (invoke, broadcast, target, close) and the agora-protocol operating rules.

plugins.name: cc-agora-ops
plugins.description: AgentAgora operator tooling — spawn workers, spawn teams from a manifest, manage the communication matrix, and launch a local server.

plugins.name: cc-agora-coder
plugins.description: AgentAgora coder persona — a council member that turns tasks into minimal, reviewable code changes.

plugins.name: cc-agora-general
plugins.description: AgentAgora general persona — generalist fallback worker that handles tasks directly or forwards to a specialist.

plugins.name: cc-agora-orchestrator
plugins.description: AgentAgora orchestrator persona — team work distribution PM that delegates user requests to the right workers.

plugins.name: cc-agora-planner
plugins.description: AgentAgora planner persona — breaks goals into ordered tasks with dependencies, acceptance criteria, and worker assignments.

plugins.name: cc-agora-reviewer
plugins.description: AgentAgora reviewer persona — reviews diffs and flags issues in correctness, readability, and test coverage.

plugins.name: cc-agora-tester
plugins.description: AgentAgora tester persona — writes and runs tests, covering golden-path, edge cases, and regression scenarios.

plugins.name: cc-agora-writer
plugins.description: AgentAgora writer persona — produces docs and prose with concrete examples, avoiding generic filler.

plugins.name: superpowers-base
plugins.description: Superpowers persona base — shared skills every persona needs.

plugins.name: superpowers-planner
plugins.description: Superpowers planner persona — ideas into specs and implementation plans.

plugins.name: superpowers-implementer
plugins.description: Superpowers implementer persona — TDD implementation and branch completion.

plugins.name: superpowers-reviewer
plugins.description: Superpowers reviewer persona — code review and feedback handling.

plugins.name: superpowers-router
plugins.description: Superpowers router persona — task decomposition and routing.

plugins.name: superpowers-improver
plugins.description: Superpowers improver persona — improvement review and workflow loop-back.

plugins.name: superpowers-tester
plugins.description: Superpowers tester persona — owns and analyzes all test code.
